creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Whoops - I misread the report, but still, even with mk_subst replaced by
mk_cmds, I fail to see how chmod (of all) could fail.

Please provide the FULL log of

make clean && make V=1

Note that you can disregard the asm/types.h and __*_TYPEDEF warnings,
they are unrelated.
